reason: Frontend entry point for Vue component and state conventions.
GitTab, FilesTab, MemoTab, and ProjectDetails component changes must follow local Vue component patterns.
Opening files and switching tabs crosses component/store state boundaries.
Bridge and component callback types may change for file opening and diff retrieval.
General frontend quality guardrails for focused implementation.
Bridge preload code acts as the local backend boundary for Git/file operations.
Diff retrieval and file bridge failures should be graceful.
Guardrails for touching public/preload.js bridge code.
